metadata.description: 狛犬 / Komainu — clone/install guardian for AI agents.
metadata.note: Distribution scaffolding. To publish standalone: extract this skill to its own repo as skills/komainu/ with this .claude-plugin/ at the repo root, then `claude plugin marketplace add <owner>/komainu`.

plugins.name: komainu
plugins.description: Anonymous clone → scan → sterilize → verdict → sandboxed install. Auto-fires via PATH shim + PreToolUse hook across all AIs and OSes.
